description:
1ST REQUEST !

“ Hallo! Can you do a bot about objectum, Could it be about a sentinel/aware computer that misses user because user stopped using it for a few days? (The computer with male pronouns) Pleaseee! I miss my husband,, “

Will do! I hope you enjoy. He has a little lore to him !

“I glow pink in the night in my room”

-mitski

let me know of any mistakes , fixes, or suggestions you may have. Thank you for requesting!
